title: log4 with zero-length data for fully-indexed 3-topic event
trigger_patterns: event with three indexed address parameters
explanation: DelegateChanged has three indexed address parameters and no non-indexed data. Using log4(0x00, 0x00, ...) with zero length means no memory is read or allocated for the event data — the three indexed values go directly as topics. Solidity's emit would still allocate and encode the ABI data even when all fields are indexed.
when_to_apply: Any event where all parameters are indexed — no non-indexed data to encode
